# Trademark & Name-Use Policy — brain2

> Short version: **the code is free, the name is not.** The MIT License lets you
> use, fork, and sell the code. It does not let you use the "brain2" name to
> brand your own product or imply that the maintainer endorses it.

"brain2" and the brain2 logo are unregistered trademarks of Anthony Suherli
("the maintainer"). This policy explains what you may and may not do with the
name. It exists so that users can always trust that something called "brain2"
is the genuine project.

## You MAY, without asking

- State, truthfully, that your product "works with brain2," "is built on
  brain2," "is compatible with brain2," or "is a fork of brain2."
- Use the name in blog posts, talks, tutorials, reviews, and academic work.
- Keep the name in unmodified copies you redistribute under the MIT License.
- Use the name in the URL or title of a community discussion, plugin, or
  integration, as long as it's clear you are not the official project.

## You MAY NOT, without written permission

- Name your own product, service, company, or fork "brain2" or a name
  confusingly similar to it (e.g. "brain2 Pro," "brain2 Cloud," "brain2ai").
- Use the brain2 name or logo in a way that suggests the maintainer produces,
  sponsors, or endorses your product.
- Register "brain2" (or a confusingly similar mark) as a trademark, domain,
  social handle, or app-store listing in any jurisdiction.
- Modify the brain2 logo or use it as your own product's logo.

## Forks

You are free to fork brain2 under the MIT License — that's the point. But if you
distribute a modified version, **rename it** so users aren't misled into
thinking it's the official brain2. A short attribution line ("based on brain2
by Anthony Suherli") is welcome and sufficient.

## Questions / permission requests

Email **anthonysuherli@gmail.com** to request permission for any use not
covered above. Reasonable requests are usually granted.

---

*This policy may be updated. The current version always lives in this file in
the official repository.*
